summary: Add Vitest test coverage for the Standup app: component rendering, Slack/GitHub/Workspace/Jira data display, source filtering, auth gate, and server page.
implementation:
Follow the exact patterns from Accounts app tests (apps/web/app/apps/accounts/__tests__/). Create four test files: 1. __tests__/standup-app.test.tsx — Client component tests using renderWithProviders from @repo/test-utils: - Renders heading 'Daily Standup' and subtitle text - Renders all 5 filter buttons (All Sources, Slack, GitHub, Workspace, Jira) - Renders DayCards with day-of-week, formatted date, activity count, and source badges for mock StandupDay[] data - Slack activities: renders source group with icon/label, sorted activity times and descriptions - GitHub activities: same verification with GitHub-specific mock data - Workspace/Jira activities: same pattern - Filtering: clicking 'Slack' filter hides GitHub/Workspace/Jira activities; clicking 'All Sources' restores all - Empty state: passing days=[] shows 'No standup entries yet' - lastUpdated: when provided, renders 'Last updated:' with the value; when null, omits it 2. __tests__/page.test.tsx — Server component test: - Mock '@/app/apps/standup/lib/queries' with vi.mock, return mock StandupDay[] - Mock StandupApp component to a simple div that renders props - Await StandupPage(), renderWithProviders the JSX, assert StandupApp received days and lastUpdated props 3. __tests__/layout.test.tsx — Auth gate test: - Mock '@/lib/require-app-layout-access' with vi.mock - Await StandupLayout({ children:
test
}), renderWithProviders - Assert requireAppLayoutAccess called with 'standup' - Assert children rendered, header with 'Daily Standup' present, Dashboard link present 4. lib/__tests__/queries.test.ts — Query logic test: - Mock '@repo/db/server' createClient to return createMockSupabase from @repo/test-utils - Test getStandupDays returns parsed StandupDay[] from mock data - Test JSON string activities get parsed correctly - Test error case returns empty array - Test empty data returns empty array Mock data shape: { id, date: '2025-04-07', dayOfWeek: 'Monday', activities: [{ source: 'slack'|'github'|'workspace'|'jira', time: '9:00', description: 'text' }], createdAt, updatedAt }

testing.reason: This issue is entirely about adding test coverage for the Standup app.

verification.reason: No UI changes — this issue only adds test files. Verification is running pnpm test.
